---
title: "Stratified_Subsampling"
author: "Sachin Subedi"
date: "2025-12-10"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
```

#Set Working Directory
```{r}
setwd("~/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofGeorgia/EU_H5/may/data/Again/after_draft/pipeline/GitHub/")
```

### Loading data for subsampling
```{r}
data <- read.delim("final_seq_data.tsv", sep="\t", stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
colnames(data)
```
## Extract seasons, year and Habitat
```{r}
library(lubridate)
data <- data %>%
  mutate(
    Year = year(Collection_Date_Final)
  )


selected_locations <- unique(data$Country)
selected_years     <- unique(data$Year)
selected_habitats  <- unique(data$Habitat)
```

## Subsampling using random seeds
```{r}
subsample_and_save <- function(data, seed, label, max_samples = 2) {
  set.seed(seed)

  subsampled_data <- data %>%
    group_by(Country, Year, Habitat) %>%
    group_modify(function(.x, .y) {
      if (nrow(.x) <= max_samples) {
        return(.x)
      } else {
        return(slice_sample(.x, n = max_samples))
      }
    }) %>%
    ungroup()

  subsampled_counts <- subsampled_data %>%
    group_by(Country, Year, Habitat) %>%
    summarise(isolate_count = n_distinct(Isolate_Id), .groups = "drop")

  # Checks
  cat("\n==========", label, "==========\n")
  print(subsampled_counts)
  print(table(subsampled_data$Country))
  print(table(subsampled_data$Year))
  print(table(subsampled_data$Habitat))

  # Create folder if not exists
  if (!dir.exists(label)) dir.create(label)

  # Save TSV inside the folder
  out_file <- file.path(label, paste0(label, ".tsv"))
  write.table(subsampled_data, out_file, sep="\t", row.names=FALSE, quote=FALSE)

  return(list(data = subsampled_data, counts = subsampled_counts))
}

subsampled1 <- subsample_and_save(data, seed = 2324,   label = "subsampled1")
subsampled2 <- subsample_and_save(data, seed = 147181, label = "subsampled2")
subsampled3 <- subsample_and_save(data, seed = 8848,   label = "subsampled3")

```

### Comparison of different subsamples
```{r}


library(dplyr)
library(readr)

base_dir <- "~/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofGeorgia/EU_H5/may/data/Again/after_draft/pipeline/GitHub/"

sub1 <- read_tsv(file.path(base_dir, "subsampled1", "subsampled1.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
sub2 <- read_tsv(file.path(base_dir, "subsampled2", "subsampled2.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
sub3 <- read_tsv(file.path(base_dir, "subsampled3", "subsampled3.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

# Extract IDs
ids1 <- unique(sub1$Isolate_Id)
ids2 <- unique(sub2$Isolate_Id)
ids3 <- unique(sub3$Isolate_Id)

cat("Counts:\n")
cat("subsampled1:", length(ids1), "unique IDs\n")
cat("subsampled2:", length(ids2), "unique IDs\n")
cat("subsampled3:", length(ids3), "unique IDs\n\n")

# Pairwise overlaps
cat("Overlaps:\n")
cat("1 ∩ 2:", length(intersect(ids1, ids2)), "\n")
cat("1 ∩ 3:", length(intersect(ids1, ids3)), "\n")
cat("2 ∩ 3:", length(intersect(ids2, ids3)), "\n")
cat("1 ∩ 2 ∩ 3:", length(Reduce(intersect, list(ids1, ids2, ids3))), "\n\n")

# Unique to each
cat("Unique IDs per set:\n")
cat("Only in subsampled1:", length(setdiff(ids1, union(ids2, ids3))), "\n")
cat("Only in subsampled2:", length(setdiff(ids2, union(ids1, ids3))), "\n")
cat("Only in subsampled3:", length(setdiff(ids3, union(ids1, ids2))), "\n")

```
## Venn diagram of subsamples
```{r}
library(ggplot2)

base_dir <- "~/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofGeorgia/EU_H5/may/data/Again/after_draft/pipeline/GitHub/"
f1 <- file.path(base_dir, "subsampled1", "subsampled1.tsv")
f2 <- file.path(base_dir, "subsampled2", "subsampled2.tsv")
f3 <- file.path(base_dir, "subsampled3", "subsampled3.tsv")

sub1 <- read.delim(f1, sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
sub2 <- read.delim(f2, sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
sub3 <- read.delim(f3, sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

ids1 <- unique(sub1$Isolate_Id)
ids2 <- unique(sub2$Isolate_Id)
ids3 <- unique(sub3$Isolate_Id)

i12  <- intersect(ids1, ids2)
i13  <- intersect(ids1, ids3)
i23  <- intersect(ids2, ids3)
i123 <- Reduce(intersect, list(ids1, ids2, ids3))

only1 <- setdiff(ids1, union(ids2, ids3))
only2 <- setdiff(ids2, union(ids1, ids3))
only3 <- setdiff(ids3, union(ids1, ids2))
only12 <- setdiff(i12,  ids3)
only13 <- setdiff(i13,  ids2)
only23 <- setdiff(i23,  ids1)

n1   <- length(only1)
n2   <- length(only2)
n3   <- length(only3)
n12  <- length(only12)
n13  <- length(only13)
n23  <- length(only23)
n123 <- length(i123)

circle_df <- function(cx, cy, r = 1.5, n = 400, id = "A") {
  t <- seq(0, 2*pi, length.out = n)
  data.frame(
    x = cx + r*cos(t),
    y = cy + r*sin(t),
    set = id
  )
}

c1 <- c(-1.4,  0.0)  # subsampled1
c2 <- c( 1.4,  0.0)  # subsampled2
c3 <- c( 0.0,  1.6)  # subsampled3
r  <- 1.8

circles <- rbind(
  circle_df(c1[1], c1[2], r, id = "subsampled1"),
  circle_df(c2[1], c2[2], r, id = "subsampled2"),
  circle_df(c3[1], c3[2], r, id = "subsampled3")
)

# ---- colors (your request) ----
fill_map <- c(
  subsampled1 = "#CD5C5C",
  subsampled2 = "#0072B2",
  subsampled3 = "#006D2C"
)

pos_only1 <- c(c1[1] - 0.7, c1[2] - 0.2)
pos_only2 <- c(c2[1] + 0.7, c2[2] - 0.2)
pos_only3 <- c(c3[1],       c3[2] + 0.9)

pos_12 <- c(0, -0.5)
pos_13 <- c(-0.6, 0.8)
pos_23 <- c(0.6,  0.8)
pos_123 <- c(0, 0.4)

lab1 <- list(text = "subsampled1", pos = c(c1[1] - 2.6, c1[2] - 0.1), to = c(c1[1] - r*0.9, c1[2]))
lab2 <- list(text = "subsampled2", pos = c(c2[1] + 2.6, c2[2] - 0.1), to = c(c2[1] + r*0.9, c2[2]))
lab3 <- list(text = "subsampled3", pos = c(c3[1],       c3[2] + 2.6), to = c(c3[1],       c3[2] + r*0.9))

p <- ggplot() +
  geom_polygon(
    data = circles, aes(x = x, y = y, fill = set, group = set),
    color = "black", linewidth = 0.5, alpha = 0.32
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = fill_map,
    labels = c("subsampled1", "subsampled2", "subsampled3"),
    name   = "Subsamples"
  ) +
  coord_fixed(xlim = c(-5, 5), ylim = c(-3, 5), expand = FALSE) +
  theme_void(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    legend.position   = "top",
    legend.direction  = "horizontal",
    legend.box        = "full",
    legend.title    = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    legend.text     = element_text(size = 13),
    plot.title      = element_blank()   # remove title
  )

p <- p +
  annotate("text", x = pos_only1[1], y = pos_only1[2], label = n1,   size = 6, fontface = "bold") +
  annotate("text", x = pos_only2[1], y = pos_only2[2], label = n2,   size = 6, fontface = "bold") +
  annotate("text", x = pos_only3[1], y = pos_only3[2], label = n3,   size = 6, fontface = "bold") +
  annotate("text", x = pos_12[1],    y = pos_12[2],    label = n12,  size = 6, fontface = "bold") +
  annotate("text", x = pos_13[1],    y = pos_13[2],    label = n13,  size = 6, fontface = "bold") +
  annotate("text", x = pos_23[1],    y = pos_23[2],    label = n23,  size = 6, fontface = "bold") +
  annotate("text", x = pos_123[1],   y = pos_123[2],   label = n123, size = 6, fontface = "bold")

ggsave(file.path(base_dir, "IsolateId_venn_withLegend.png"), p,
       width = 9, height = 7, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
ggsave(file.path(base_dir, "IsolateId_venn_withLegend.pdf"), p,
       width = 9, height = 7, bg = "white")

p

```




### Plotting of all subsamples

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(lubridate)
library(scales)
library(patchwork)
library(readxl)

# setwd("~/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofGeorgia/EU_H5/may/data/Again/after_draft/pipeline/")
runs <- c("subsampled1","subsampled2","subsampled3")

required_seq  <- "final_seq_data.tsv"
required_case <- "Latest Reported Events.xlsx"

if (!file.exists(required_seq))  stop("Missing final_seq_data.tsv in parent dir")
if (!file.exists(required_case)) stop("Missing Latest Reported Events.xlsx in parent dir")

base_dir <- getwd()

find_subsample_tsv <- function(d, base_dir){
  dir_abs <- file.path(base_dir, d)
  candidates <- c(
    file.path(dir_abs, paste0(d, ".tsv")),
    file.path(dir_abs, "subsampled_data.tsv"),
    file.path(dir_abs, "subsampled.tsv")
  )
  hit <- candidates[file.exists(candidates)]
  if (length(hit) == 0) {
    stop(paste(
      "Missing subsampled TSV in", d, "— tried:",
      paste(basename(candidates), collapse = ", ")
    ))
  }
  hit[[1]]
}

for (d in runs) {

  setwd(base_dir)
  dir.create(d, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

  file.copy(file.path(base_dir, required_seq),  file.path(base_dir, d, required_seq),  overwrite = TRUE)
  file.copy(file.path(base_dir, required_case), file.path(base_dir, d, required_case), overwrite = TRUE)

  src_tsv_abs <- find_subsample_tsv(d, base_dir)
  file.copy(src_tsv_abs, file.path(base_dir, d, "subsampled_data.tsv"), overwrite = TRUE)

  message("Running plots in: ", d)
  setwd(file.path(base_dir, d))

  # ---- Read inputs ----------------------------------------------------------
  full_raw      <- read.delim("final_seq_data.tsv",  sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  subsample_raw <- read.delim("subsampled_data.tsv", sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  case_raw      <- read_excel("Latest Reported Events.xlsx")

  # ---- Use Collection_Date_Final and derive Year ----------------------------
  full_raw <- full_raw %>%
    mutate(Collection_Date_Final = as.Date(Collection_Date_Final),
           Year = lubridate::year(Collection_Date_Final))

  subsample_raw <- subsample_raw %>%
    mutate(Collection_Date_Final = as.Date(Collection_Date_Final),
           Year = lubridate::year(Collection_Date_Final))

  # ---- Cases per year -------------------------------------------------------
  case_europe <- case_raw %>%
    mutate(Year = lubridate::year(as.Date(`observation date`))) %>%
    group_by(Year) %>%
    summarise(total_cases = dplyr::n_distinct(`Event ID`), .groups = "drop")

    hab_pal <- c(
    Coastal="#0072B2", Farm="#CD5C5C", Forest="#BCBD22", Grassland="#26A69A",
    `Human_Modified`="#56B4E9", Marine="#CC79A7", Shrubland="lightslategray",
    Urban="#E6842A", Others="#000000", Woodland="#6B4C1B", Rock="#7570B3", Wetland="#006D2C"
  )

  clean_hab <- function(df) df %>%
    mutate(Habitat = trimws(Habitat),
           Habitat = ifelse(Habitat %in% names(hab_pal), Habitat, "Others"))

  full_hab <- clean_hab(full_raw)
  sub_hab  <- clean_hab(subsample_raw)

  hab_counts_full <- full_hab %>%
    group_by(Year, Habitat) %>%
    summarise(n_isolates = n_distinct(Isolate_Id), .groups = "drop") %>%
    left_join(case_europe, by = "Year")

  hab_counts_sub <- sub_hab %>%
    group_by(Year, Habitat) %>%
    summarise(n_isolates = n_distinct(Isolate_Id), .groups = "drop") %>%
    left_join(case_europe, by = "Year")

  scale_hab_full <- max(hab_counts_full$n_isolates, na.rm = TRUE) / max(hab_counts_full$total_cases, na.rm = TRUE)
  scale_hab_sub  <- max(hab_counts_sub$n_isolates,  na.rm = TRUE) / max(hab_counts_sub$total_cases,  na.rm = TRUE)

  plot_hab <- function(df, sf, ttl){
    ggplot(df, aes(x = Year)) +
      geom_bar(aes(y = n_isolates, fill = Habitat),
               stat = "identity", position = "dodge", width = 1.4) +
      geom_line(aes(y = total_cases * sf), colour = "black", size = 1) +
      geom_point(aes(y = total_cases * sf), colour = "black", size = 2) +
      geom_text(
        data = df %>% filter(Year == 2017) %>% slice(1),
        aes(x = Year, y = total_cases * sf, label = "Case Counts"),
        colour = "black", size = 7, hjust = -0.2, vjust = -0.8, inherit.aes = FALSE
      ) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = hab_pal, drop = FALSE) +
      scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2016:2025) +
      scale_y_continuous("Number of Isolates",
                         sec.axis = sec_axis(~./sf, name = "Number of Cases")) +
      labs(title = ttl, x = "Year") +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
      theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.direction = "horizontal")
  }

  p_hab_full <- plot_hab(hab_counts_full, scale_hab_full, "Isolates & Cases by Habitat (Full Data)")
  p_hab_sub  <- plot_hab(hab_counts_sub,  scale_hab_sub,  "Isolates & Cases by Habitat (Subsample)")

  combined_hab <- (p_hab_full / p_hab_sub) +
    plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")

  type_pal <- c(
    Domestic_Mammal="#6A3D9A", Domestic_Bird="#CD5C5C",
    Wild_Mammal="#BCBD22", Human="#1B9E77", Wild_Bird="#3C5488", Others="#000000"
  )

  clean_type <- function(df) df %>%
    mutate(Type = trimws(Type),
           Type = ifelse(Type %in% names(type_pal), Type, "Others"))

  full_type <- clean_type(full_raw)
  sub_type  <- clean_type(subsample_raw)

  type_counts_full <- full_type %>%
    group_by(Year, Type) %>%
    summarise(n_isolates = n_distinct(Isolate_Id), .groups = "drop") %>%
    left_join(case_europe, by = "Year")

  type_counts_sub <- sub_type %>%
    group_by(Year, Type) %>%
    summarise(n_isolates = n_distinct(Isolate_Id), .groups = "drop") %>%
    left_join(case_europe, by = "Year")

  scale_type_full <- max(type_counts_full$n_isolates, na.rm = TRUE) / max(type_counts_full$total_cases, na.rm = TRUE)
  scale_type_sub  <- max(type_counts_sub$n_isolates,  na.rm = TRUE) / max(type_counts_sub$total_cases,  na.rm = TRUE)

  plot_type <- function(df, sf, ttl){
    ggplot(df, aes(x = Year)) +
      geom_bar(aes(y = n_isolates, fill = Type),
               stat = "identity", position = "dodge", width = 1.4) +
      geom_line(aes(y = total_cases * sf), colour = "black", size = 1) +
      geom_point(aes(y = total_cases * sf), colour = "black", size = 2) +
      geom_text(
        data = df %>% filter(Year == 2017) %>% slice(1),
        aes(x = Year, y = total_cases * sf, label = "Case Counts"),
        colour = "black", size = 7, hjust = -0.2, vjust = -0.8, inherit.aes = FALSE
      ) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = type_pal, name = "Host", drop = FALSE) +
      scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2016:2025) +
      scale_y_continuous("Number of Isolates",
                         sec.axis = sec_axis(~./sf, name = "Number of Cases")) +
      labs(title = ttl, x = "Year") +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
      theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.direction = "horizontal")
  }

  p_type_full <- plot_type(type_counts_full, scale_type_full, "Isolates & Cases by Host Type (Full Data)")
  p_type_sub  <- plot_type(type_counts_sub,  scale_type_sub,  "Isolates & Cases by Host Type (Subsample)")

  combined_type <- (p_type_full / p_type_sub) +
    plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")

  geo_pal <- c(
    GeoCluster_One="#4DBBD5", GeoCluster_Two="#F39B7F",
    GeoCluster_Three="#3C5488", GeoCluster_Four="#BCBD22", GeoCluster_Five="#1B9E77"
  )

  geo_breaks <- c(
    "GeoCluster_One","GeoCluster_Two","GeoCluster_Three","GeoCluster_Four","GeoCluster_Five"
  )

  geo_labels <- c(
    GeoCluster_One   = "South-Eastern Europe",
    GeoCluster_Two   = "Central-Eastern Europe",
    GeoCluster_Three = "Central-Western Europe",
    GeoCluster_Four  = "Northern Europe",
    GeoCluster_Five  = "Central-Southern Europe"
  )

  clean_geo <- function(df) df %>%
    mutate(
      GeoCluster = trimws(GeoCluster),
      GeoCluster = ifelse(GeoCluster %in% names(geo_pal), GeoCluster, "Others"),
      GeoCluster = factor(
        GeoCluster,
        levels = geo_breaks
      )
    )

  full_geo <- clean_geo(full_raw)
  sub_geo  <- clean_geo(subsample_raw)

  geo_counts_full <- full_geo %>%
    group_by(Year, GeoCluster) %>%
    summarise(n_isolates = n_distinct(Isolate_Id), .groups = "drop") %>%
    left_join(case_europe, by = "Year")

  geo_counts_sub <- sub_geo %>%
    group_by(Year, GeoCluster) %>%
    summarise(n_isolates = n_distinct(Isolate_Id), .groups = "drop") %>%
    left_join(case_europe, by = "Year")

  scale_geo_full <- max(geo_counts_full$n_isolates, na.rm = TRUE) / max(geo_counts_full$total_cases, na.rm = TRUE)
  scale_geo_sub  <- max(geo_counts_sub$n_isolates,  na.rm = TRUE) / max(geo_counts_sub$total_cases,  na.rm = TRUE)

  plot_geo <- function(df, sf, ttl){
    ggplot(df, aes(x = Year)) +
      geom_bar(aes(y = n_isolates, fill = GeoCluster),
               stat = "identity", position = "dodge", width = 1.4) +
      geom_line(aes(y = total_cases * sf), colour = "black", size = 1) +
      geom_point(aes(y = total_cases * sf), colour = "black", size = 2) +
      geom_text(
        data = df %>% filter(Year == 2017) %>% slice(1),
        aes(x = Year, y = total_cases * sf, label = "Case Counts"),
        colour = "black", size = 7, hjust = -0.2, vjust = -0.8, inherit.aes = FALSE
      ) +
      scale_fill_manual(
        values = c(geo_pal, Others = "#000000"),
        name   = "Region",
        drop   = FALSE,
        breaks = geo_breaks,
        labels = unname(geo_labels[geo_breaks])
      ) +
      scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2016:2025) +
      scale_y_continuous("Number of Isolates",
                         sec.axis = sec_axis(~./sf, name = "Number of Cases")) +
      labs(title = ttl, x = "Year") +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
      theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.direction = "horizontal")
  }

  p_geo_full <- plot_geo(geo_counts_full, scale_geo_full, "Isolates & Cases by Region (Full Data)")
  p_geo_sub  <- plot_geo(geo_counts_sub,  scale_geo_sub,  "Isolates & Cases by Region (Subsample)")

  combined_geo <- (p_geo_full / p_geo_sub) +
    plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")

  suffix_num <- gsub("\\D", "", basename(getwd()))

  ggsave(paste0("Habitat_subsampling", suffix_num, ".png"),
         combined_hab,  width = 14, height = 9, dpi = 300, bg = "transparent")
  ggsave(paste0("Habitat_subsampling", suffix_num, ".pdf"),
         combined_hab,  width = 14, height = 9)

  ggsave(paste0("Host_subsampling",   suffix_num, ".png"),
         combined_type, width = 14, height = 9, dpi = 300)
  ggsave(paste0("Host_subsampling",   suffix_num, ".pdf"),
         combined_type, width = 14, height = 9)

  ggsave(paste0("GeoClusters_subsampling", suffix_num, ".png"),
         combined_geo, width = 14, height = 9, dpi = 300)
  ggsave(paste0("GeoClusters_subsampling", suffix_num, ".pdf"),
         combined_geo, width = 14, height = 9)

  setwd(base_dir)
}

```
## Writing a fasta file
```{r}

base_dir <- "~/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofGeorgia/EU_H5/may/data/Again/after_draft/pipeline/GitHub/"

runs <- c("subsampled1","subsampled2","subsampled3")

for (d in runs) {
  tsv_file <- file.path(base_dir, d, paste0(d, ".tsv"))
  if (!file.exists(tsv_file)) stop("Missing TSV file: ", tsv_file)

  subsampled_data <- read.delim(tsv_file, sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

  fasta_file <- file.path(base_dir, d, paste0(d, ".fasta"))

  fileConn <- file(fasta_file, "w")

  apply(subsampled_data, 1, function(row) {
    header <- paste0(
      ">", row["Isolate_Id"], "|",
      row["Isolate_Name"], "|",
      row["Habitat"], "|",
      row["Type"], "|",
      row["Country"], "|",
      row["GeoCluster"], "|",
      row["Collection_Date_Final"]
    )
    writeLines(header, fileConn)
    writeLines(row["Sequence"], fileConn)
  })

  close(fileConn)

  cat("FASTA file saved as", fasta_file, "\n")
}

```
